About

The story
behind the work

I'm a brand and digital marketing student based in Santa Clara, California, with a passion for creating campaigns that move people and metrics alike.

"Where strategy meets storytelling — that's where great brands are built."

My background spans full-funnel campaign management, content strategy, art direction, and performance analytics. I've worked across consumer cycling, higher education, and direct-to-consumer — always with the same goal: make the brand feel real to the audience.

I'm completing my degree at Santa Clara University and am open to full-time roles in brand marketing, digital strategy, and campaign management. Class of 2026.

Brand StrategyCampaign Management Art DirectionContent Strategy Paid MediaCopywriting Email MarketingSocial Media
